overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 walking through an industrial district featuring massive power plant cooling towers, smokestacks, and transitioning into narrow industrial streets with overhead walkways and urban decay. The scene progresses from an open power plant approach into increasingly enclosed industrial corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial road with power plant cooling towers

events.description: two pedestrians appear walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk toward the massive cooling towers in the distance

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete hyperboloid cooling tower emitting white steam
tall red and white striped industrial chimney
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
concrete industrial facility with metal railings and pipes
modern orange and white street lamp post

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial road with massive cooling towers and striped smokestacks dominating the horizon. The camera walks steadily along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, approaching two pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The scene is brightly lit with natural midday sun casting sharp shadows across the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: power plant perimeter with massive cooling towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the massive scale of the cooling towers
turning left away from the cooling towers into a different industrial street

agents.ego_description: approaching the cooling towers and tilting the view upward to appreciate their massive scale before turning left

entered.detail: thick bushes and undergrowth at the base of the industrial structures
wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the massive cooling towers, tilting upward to emphasize their scale as steam billows from the top. Dense vegetation appears in the foreground as the path curves. The segment ends with a left turn away from the towers, transitioning to a new industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with red steel gantries

events.description: passing parked vehicles including a blue van and abandoned cars

agents.ego_description: turning left at the industrial intersection and proceeding down the road past parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue van parked on the side of the industrial road

entered.detail: large red steel overhead gantry spanning across the road
concrete warehouse building with loading docks and metal shutters
rusted red car with doors open and damaged body

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a new industrial street characterized by massive red steel gantries crossing overhead. The camera passes abandoned vehicles and a blue van parked along the roadside. The environment shifts from power plant infrastructure to warehouse districts with concrete industrial buildings.

events.description: entering covered industrial corridor beneath elevated walkways and pipes

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow industrial corridor beneath overhead walkways and past concrete walls

entered.detail: elevated industrial walkway with glass sides and metal framework spanning the street
large building with illuminated NIGHT CITY signage on the facade
tall concrete wall with dry grass growing at the base
large advertisement billboard on the side of the industrial building

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow industrial corridor with overhead walkways casting shadows on the street. The NIGHT CITY sign becomes visible on a distant building. The camera passes beneath multiple levels of industrial infrastructure including pipes and elevated walkways, with concrete walls enclosing the right side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in an open power plant district and gradually descends into the enclosed, decaying industrial corridors of the city. It begins on a wide concrete sidewalk under a bright midday sun, moving past palm trees and pedestrians toward massive cooling towers and striped smokestacks. As the camera approaches these structures, it tilts upward to capture billowing steam before curving through dense vegetation and turning away from the plant. The scene then shifts into a warehouse district, passing abandoned vehicles and a blue van beneath massive red steel gantries that cross overhead. Finally, the environment narrows into a shadowed industrial corridor of pipes and elevated walkways, where the path is enclosed by concrete walls and the Night City sign emerges on a distant building.
